creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #1)

Hi Neel, thanks for the quick response! I am still seeing the same build error from pkg-fallout as on my desktop just now for 13.0 amd64. Is this a different issue, or the sysutils/glib20 one that you referred to?

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-gnome/2021-August/000648.html
